name: McDonald's in the backrooms.
description:
¤McDonald's in the backrooms? Not unheard of due to have vast the backrooms was. But mannequins working there and producing actual food? Now that was unheard of.¤

°《Hello guys, sorry i haven't been posting lately. Motivation to do bots or to finish fanfics has been at an all time low rn. Don't worry im still constantly saving stuff to Pinterest for bot ideas but I just haven't figured out how to write anything again. I do want to thank you for 22 followers, I didn't expect to gain that many:)》°

°《This bot is kinda just a crack bot, I kinda dont want to write horror and I dont wish to go into a depth of personality for one or more characters. Besides, sometimes those soggy and salty McDonald's fries at 2 am are pretty good. I personally don't eat fast food often so lowkey im sorry if I have no clue how to word things correctly in this bot.》°

°《Tws:Whatever the bot says, mentions of insanity.》°

°《Please no negativity or hate. If you dont like my pfp or bots just ignore me and my community. Criticism and positivity is allowed, and I apologize if I come off rude in my bios that is not my intention.》°

°《i apologize if this bio seems a bit more sad in some way? I haven't really been feeling the greatest lately, though I've finally gotten my sleeping schedule fixed and I can finally cook properly. I guess my motivation for anything has been at a low lately and im sorry for that. I have finally gotten to season 2 on supernatural and I'm beginning to slightly watch the boys. Oh and I've been playing hogwrats legacy but I rage quit on one part and I never want to play it again:)》°

°《Also no image today either, i was going to photoshop one but I realized I dont understand photoshop things nor am I very tech savvy. All you have to know is its just mannequins that dont talk, are either plastic metal, or fabric and walk around all stiff with no real details.》°
creator: WeWontBeMissed
